Join Our Family Today!

Our Location

828 Rochell Ct.
Rockwall, TX 75032
972-772-7777
Also serving Heath, TX and surrounding areas.

Our Hours

Monday – Friday: 8AM – 6PM
Saturday: 9AM – 3PM (Grooming not available)
Sunday: Closed
